title: AN ACT FIXING THE BOUNDARY BETWEEN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF PIÃAN AND POLANCO IN THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1160 / 65 OG No. 8, 1806 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4982, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT FIXING THE BOUNDARY BETWEEN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF PIÃAN AND POLANCO IN THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
SECTION 1. The boundary between the Municipality of Piñan and the Municipality of Polanco in the Province of Zamboanga del Norte is hereby fixed and shall be as follows:

"From the intersection of latitude of eight degrees and thirty minutes (8Â° 30') and the boundary of Dapitan City running southwest in straight line until it intersects the center of Kalambuayan Bridge; thence southwest in straight line until it intersects the confluence of Gumay and Disoy Rivers; thence following Disoy River upstream until it intersects longtitude one hundred twenty-three degrees and twenty-four minutes (123Â° 24'), thence due south until it intersects Layawan River; thence following Layawan River upstream until it intersects the Zamboanga del Norte and Misamis Occidental boundary; thence due north until it intersects latitude eight degrees and twenty minutes (8Â° 20') ; thence due west until it intersects Disoy River, thence following Disoy River downstream until It intersects, longtitude one hundred twenty-three degrees and twenty-eight minutes (123Â° 28') ; thence northeast in straight line until it reaches Kilometer Post No. 324.00 of Piñan-Mutya; Road; thence southeast in straight line until MBM No. 12 of Dagupan City boundary; thence northwest following the Dapitan City boundary until it intersects latitude eight degrees and thirty minutes (8Â° 30') ; the
City boundary; thence northwest following the Dapitan City boundary until it intersects latitude eight degrees and thirty minutes (8Â° 30') ; the point of beginning."
SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
